# 接口: DataProcessorDefinition

Definition of DataProcessor(s)

## 属性

### dataProcessors?

```ts
optional dataProcessors: DataProcessors;
```

Should be used with `lynx.registerDataProcessors`. See more examples at [Lynx.registerDataProcessors](/api/react/Interface.Lynx.mdx#registerdataprocessors).

***

### defaultDataProcessor()?

```ts
optional defaultDataProcessor: (rawInitData: InitDataRaw) => InitData;
```

You can custom input and output type of `defaultDataProcessor` by extends [InitDataRaw](/api/react/Interface.InitDataRaw.mdx) and [InitData](/api/react/Interface.InitData.mdx)

Should be used with `lynx.registerDataProcessors`. See more examples at [Lynx.registerDataProcessors](/api/react/Interface.Lynx.mdx#registerdataprocessors).

#### 参数

| 范围 | 类型 | 描述 |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `rawInitData` | [`InitDataRaw`](/api/react/Interface.InitDataRaw.mdx) | initData passed from native code |

#### 返回

[`InitData`](/api/react/Interface.InitData.mdx)
